description_long: This is a modern, dual-level coffee table featuring two rectangular tabletops with rounded corners, one in black marble and the other in white marble. The black marble tabletop is positioned lower and slightly forward, while the white marble tabletop is elevated and set back, creating a tiered effect. Both tabletops display natural marble veining, adding a touch of elegance and luxury. The table is supported by a geometric metal frame with angular legs, finished in a dark color for the black marble side and a bronze tone for the white marble side. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or stylish outdoor patios. The contrasting colors and materials make it a striking centerpiece in any setting.
description: A modern, two-tiered coffee table with black and white marble tops and angular metal legs, featuring a sleek, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black marble tabletop in front and lower, with the white marble tabletop elevated and behind, both supported by angular metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and veining of both marble tops, with the black marble on the left and white marble on the right, and the distinct metal leg finishes.
description_view_2: Rear view with the white marble tabletop in front and lower, and the black marble tabletop elevated and behind, reversing the color prominence from the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the white marble tabletop on the left and black marble on the right, emphasizing the tiered structure and leg geometry.
attribute_number_of_legs: Two angular metal frames, each supporting one tabletop
